reporter.headline: Report a concern
reporter.subheadline: Your report goes directly to the Board of Commissioners, independent of management.
reporter.modeLabel: How do you want to submit?
reporter.anonymousHint: Your identity will never be recorded. You'll receive a private code to follow up.
reporter.namedHint: You consent to your identity being shared with the Board for this case.
reporter.consentLabel: I consent to sharing my name and contact details with the Board of Commissioners for the purposes of investigating this report.
reporter.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the incident in as much detail as you can. Do not include your own name or personal details if you want to remain anonymous.
reporter.subjectLabel: Who or what department is involved? (optional)
reporter.attachmentsHint: Photos, documents, or other evidence. Maximum 10 MB per file. Metadata is automatically removed.
reporter.hrNote: Note: For ordinary HR or workplace grievances, please use the standard HR channel. This platform is for serious misconduct, fraud, and safety concerns.
reporter.commissionerFlag: Does this report concern a member of the Board of Commissioners?

accessCode.title: Your private access code
accessCode.instruction: Write this down and keep it safe. You will need it to follow up on your report. It will not be shown again.
accessCode.followUpInstruction: Enter your private access code to view your report status and messages.
accessCode.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
accessCode.codeExpired: This code has been used too many times or has expired.

thread.title: Your report
thread.messagePlaceholder: Add more detail or answer a question from the reviewer…
thread.noMessages: No messages yet. The reviewer may ask you follow-up questions here.

case.title: Case
case.noteplaceholder: Internal notes are only visible to reviewers.
case.recuseConfirm: Confirm — you will no longer see this case.

auth.totpHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
auth.setupTotpInstruction: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to view this.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
